ddls:
CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., accessibility, satisfaction) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the indicator belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the indicator (e.g., quantitative, qualitative) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the indicator */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of measurement (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the indicator was first measured */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the indicator was last measured */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicators_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the city is located */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information of the city administration */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator being tracked */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., percentage) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the data point */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data point */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the data point */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the data source was updated */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information of the data source provider */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source being integrated */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator being tracked */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date the integration was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the integration */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the integration */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)
